title: Pattern Recognition
subtitle: AI can identify patterns!
overview: This session introduces students to Pattern Recognition — how humans and computers identify similarities, shapes, sounds, numbers, and behaviors to make decisions. Students will learn how AI uses pattern recognition in face unlock, voice assistants, handwriting recognition, and smart applications.

images._note: Add photos from the actual session — AI activity photos, pattern cards, classroom activities, computer demos.

activity.title: Find the Next Pattern Game
steps: Show students a sequence of colors or shapes
Ask students to identify the repeating pattern
Students predict the next shape or color
Discuss how humans recognize patterns quickly
Explain how AI also learns patterns from examples
Challenge: Create your own pattern for friends to solve

options: Something that repeats in a predictable way
quiz.explanation: A pattern is something that repeats in a predictable order or sequence.

quiz.q: Which device commonly uses face recognition?
quiz.explanation: Smartphones use face recognition for unlocking and security.
AI uses pattern recognition to identify similarities and make decisions.

quiz.q: Which of these is an example of voice recognition?
quiz.explanation: Voice assistants like Alexa recognize speech patterns.

quiz.q: What comes next in the pattern? 🔴 🔵 🔴 🔵 ___
quiz.explanation: The colors repeat in the order red, blue, red, blue.
AI systems learn by studying data and examples.

quiz.q: Which subject is closely related to pattern recognition?
quiz.explanation: Pattern recognition is an important part of Artificial Intelligence.

quiz.q: Which example shows a visual pattern?
quiz.explanation: The number sequence repeats in a clear pattern.
AI can identify handwritten text using pattern recognition.
The star and circle repeat again and again.

quiz.q: Pattern recognition in humans mainly happens in the:
quiz.explanation: Our brain recognizes patterns quickly using memory and observation.

quiz.q: Google Assistant uses pattern recognition to:
quiz.explanation: Voice assistants identify voice patterns to understand commands.

quiz.q: What comes next in the number pattern? 2, 4, 6, 8, ___
quiz.explanation: The pattern increases by 2 each time.

quiz.q: Why is pattern recognition important in AI?
options: It helps machines make smart decisions
quiz.explanation: AI uses patterns to recognize objects, voices, faces, and make predictions.
